description: Allowlist for the FOREIGN→English canonical-validity gate (src/multilingual/foreign-canonical-validity.test.ts). Each entry is a corpus pattern id mapped to the languages whose authored translation renders English the real hyperscript.org parser rejects. A NEW invalid (pattern,language) pair outside this list, or an allowlisted pair that becomes valid, both fail the gate. Shrink as renderer/parser fixes land. Sibling of the en-render gate (canonical-validity.json).
note: Generated by checkForeignRenderValidity against a freshly-populated patterns.db. Regenerate after an intentional fidelity change (populate first). Keyed pattern→[langs] so a fix that clears a family across languages shrinks its language list.
